ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso2" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code */,
  "code3" INTEGER /* ISO 3166-1 numeric code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country is located in */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the state is located */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "government" TEXT /* Government type of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the county is located */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the county */,
  "government" TEXT /* Government type of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the case was reported */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the case was reported */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the case was reported */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "confirmed_new" INTEGER /* Number of new confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "deaths_new" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Reported symptoms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the location is situated */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the location is situated */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the location is situated */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recoveries" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being recovered */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the recovery was reported */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Status of the recovery (e.g., fully recovered, partially recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recoveries_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the hospital is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the hospital is located */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the hospital is located */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the hospital */,
  "staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff in the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being hospitalized */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the patient is treated */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was admitted to the hospital */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was discharged from the hospital */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the hospitalization (e.g., recovered, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted (e.g., PCR, rapid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case where the mutation was reported */,
  "mutation_date" TEXT /* Date when the mutation was reported */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., spike protein, RNA polymerase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations_variants" (
  "mutation_variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation variant */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation where the variant was reported */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of variant (e.g., B.1.1.7, B.1.351) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_variants_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)
